# pangolin_role_user (Resource)

Assigns a user to a Pangolin organisation role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_role_user" "example" {
  role_id = pangolin_role.example.id
  user_id = pangolin_user.example.user_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_id` (String) The ID of the role.
- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user to assign.

## Import

Import using `{role_id}/{user_id}`:

```shell
terraform import pangolin_role_user.example 42/user-abc123
```
